title: osmanthus urceolatus
intro: Osmanthus urceolatus, also known as the small flower osmanthus or small-fruit osmanthus, is a flowering plant species in the family Oleaceae. It is native to southern China and has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Osmanthus urceolatus include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In traditional Chinese medicine, Osmanthus urceolatus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
